sections.paragraph: plur. constr. פִּגְרֵי m., a carcase, dead body, whether of man or of beasts, Gen 15:11 Isa 14:19 1Sa 17:46 and frequently. Once with the addition of מֵת Isa 37:36 (compare Syr. ܦܰܓܪܳܐ used of the body even when living). Metaph. פִּגְרֵי גִּלּוּלֵיכֶם carcases, i.e. ruins of your idols, Lev 26:29.
